description: This video explains how to whitelist a withdrawal address on Binance, enhancing account security. It covers the process of enabling withdrawal address management and adding addresses to the whitelist to protect funds from unauthorized withdrawals.
topic_summary: Learn about withdrawal address management on Binance and how to whitelist addresses to secure your funds. The video details the steps to enable this feature and add addresses for safe withdrawals [t=3:08].
aliases: How to Whitelist a Withdrawal Address on Binance
